text: Now let me manually count branches more carefully by reading the actual code. Let me do a direct line-by-line analysis:

Total estimated complexity: 48

FUNCTION 3: render_event (lines 278-427 in render.rs)

Total estimated complexity: 50+

The top 3 most complex functions by combined metrics:

EOF
cat /tmp/manual_complexity.txt
